# PreviewApplication

**Class**

A class you use to configure and launch the platform Quick Look application.

## Declaration

```swift
final class PreviewApplication
```

## Type Methods

- **open(items:selectedItem:)**: Previews the provided items.
- **open(urls:selectedURL:)**: Previews the provided URLs.
title: PreviewApplication
